sigma.title: RDP over Reverse SSH Tunnel WFP
Outbound RDP Connections Over Non-Standard Tools
RDP to HTTP or HTTPS Target Ports
New Remote Desktop Connection Initiated Via Mstsc.EXE

osquery.name: t1021_001_ssh_keys
osquery.query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

osquery.name: t1021_001_net_conn
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;
